import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -current)
          else
            result = list.push(result, current)
          end
          current = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        neg = true
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -current)
    else
      result = list.push(result, current)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(s2)
      let a = parse_ints(s1)
      let b = parse_ints(s2)
      let n = a.len()
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        match a.get(i)
        when Some(x)
          match b.get(i)
          when Some(y)
            let s = x + y
            println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
          when None
            ()
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
